name: mediashell
description: A GNOME Shell extension that adds configurable MPRIS media controls to the top bar.

scripts.verify: pnpm run build && pnpm run check:shexli
scripts.build:stage: pnpm run build:clean && pnpm run build:dirs && pnpm run build:copy && pnpm run build:resources
scripts.build: pnpm run check && pnpm run build:stage && pnpm run build:pack && pnpm run check:package
scripts.ext:reinstall: pnpm run build && pnpm run ext:install && pnpm run ext:enable
scripts.translations:extract: rm -f assets/locale/mediashell@wstxda.github.com.pot && xgettext --from-code=UTF-8 --add-comments --keyword=_ --keyword=ngettext:1,2 --keyword=C_:1c,2 --language=Javascript --output=assets/locale/mediashell@wstxda.github.com.pot $(find . -type f -name '*.js' -not -path './node_modules/*' -not -path './dist/*') && xgettext --from-code=UTF-8 --add-comments --join-existing --language=Glade --output=assets/locale/mediashell@wstxda.github.com.pot $(find assets/ui -type f -name '*.ui')
scripts.translations:merge: for po in assets/locale/*.po; do msgmerge -U "$po" assets/locale/mediashell@wstxda.github.com.pot; done && rm -f assets/locale/*.po~
scripts.translations: pnpm run translations:extract && pnpm run translations:merge
